title: Annual minima and maxima of present day and future discharge, derived from PCR-GLOBWB
author: Wanders, Niko
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Global dataset of annual minima and maxima for major river system in the world. Dataset provides the present day and 2C warming simulation derived from a combination of the Global Hydrological Model, PCR-GLOBWB (https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-11-2429-2018) and the EC-EARTH Global Climate Model (https://doi.org/10.1007/s00382-011-1228-5). The large-ensemble dataset is part of the HiWAVES3 project (https://www.knmi.nl/research/weather-climate-models/projects/hiwaves3)
steps_raw: Global dataset of annual minima and maxima for major river system in the world. Dataset provides the present day and 2C warming simulation derived from a combination of the Global Hydrological Model, PCR-GLOBWB (https://doi.org/10.5194/gmd-11-2429-2018) and the EC-EARTH Global Climate Model (https://doi.org/10.1007/s00382-011-1228-5). The large-ensemble dataset is part of the HiWAVES3 project (https://www.knmi.nl/research/weather-climate-models/projects/hiwaves3)
